name: codeforge-requirements
description: codeforge 요구사항 레인 — RequirementsPLAgent + DomainAgent + RequirementsAnalyst + ResearcherAgent + ChangeImpactAgent + FeasibilityAgent + ContinuityAgent + codex-proactive-check. 7-way 병렬 관점 통합 (기존 4 + 코드 컨텍스트 3) + Codex worker proactive check. Domain Knowledge + Story §2/§5/§6/§4.1/§4.2/§4.3 self-write. codeforge core 의존. + CFP-379 RequirementsPLAgent·DomainAgent·RequirementsAnalyst·ResearcherAgent·ChangeImpactAgent·FeasibilityAgent·ContinuityAgent Opus 승격 (ADR-042 Amendment 4, ADR-057, 2026-05-11). + CFP-411 RequirementsPLAgent semantic divergence detection 3 criteria + codex-proactive-check worker 신설 (dispatch_mode auto_on_divergence) + ADR-052 Amendment 1 touchpoint #4 multi-round debate 격상 (ADR-059, 2026-05-11). + CFP-448 ChangeImpactAgent model Opus → Sonnet (ADR-057 Amendment 3 selective rollback, mandate text 변경 0건 — exclusion criterion 정합, 2026-05-12). + CFP-510 RequirementsPLAgent divergence detection 4 영역 확장 (3 semantic + 1 factual fact-check, 4 sub-criteria) + PL self-evaluation 의무 (fact claim marker 5종) + codex-proactive-check fact-check sub-criteria SSOT (ADR-052 Amendment 3, 2026-05-13). + CFP-264 FeasibilityAgent · ContinuityAgent model Opus → Sonnet (ADR-057 Amendment 4 / ADR-042 Amendment 6 — single-mandate advocacy 정합 회귀, ResearcherAgent Opus 유지 (path B Codex 권장), mandate text 변경 0건 — exclusion criterion 정합, 2026-05-13).
